# Wiener's Tools

> Browser-native image toolkit — compress, convert, edit, generate. 100% client-side.

## Primary Pages

- https://wienerstools.com/en/
- https://wienerstools.com/tr/
- https://wienerstools.com/de/
- https://wienerstools.com/ar/
- https://wienerstools.com/en/about/
- https://wienerstools.com/en/feedback/

## Tools (selected)

- https://wienerstools.com/en/tools/compress-image/
- https://wienerstools.com/en/tools/convert-format/
- https://wienerstools.com/en/tools/resize-image/
- https://wienerstools.com/en/tools/rotate-flip/
- https://wienerstools.com/en/tools/pixelart/
- https://wienerstools.com/en/tools/adjust-color/
- https://wienerstools.com/en/tools/apply-filter/
- https://wienerstools.com/en/tools/favicon-generator/
- https://wienerstools.com/en/tools/qr-generator/
- https://wienerstools.com/en/tools/palette-extractor/
- https://wienerstools.com/en/tools/ascii-art/

## Capabilities

- Image compression (JPEG/PNG/WebP/AVIF)
- Format conversion (PNG/JPEG/WebP/AVIF)
- Resize with social media presets
- Rotate, flip, pixelart, color adjust, filters
- Favicon set generator
- QR code generator
- Palette extraction (k-means)
- ASCII art generator
- Privacy-first: no image is ever uploaded

## Stack

Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, statically exported. Hosted on Cloudflare Pages.

## Contact

- Email: hello@wienerlabs.xyz
- GitHub: https://github.com/wienerlabs/wieners-tools
